Title: Performance Improvement
Speaker: Director
Setting: Director's office, blinds half-drawn, the lamp on the desk angled like an interrogation
TextLines: The folder on the desk is yours. It's thicker than you remember it being.
"The board is concerned," the Director says. The word *concerned* is doing a lot of work in that sentence.
Three paragraphs of metrics. Mission outcomes trending wrong. Asset attrition. Heat indicators the underwriters are flagging in their quarterly.
"Nobody's saying you're done. We're saying we'd like you to be… smaller. For a while."
Outside, a maintenance drone is washing the windows of the building across the gap. It moves slowly, methodically, leaving the glass clean.

Choices.Label: "Give me one more cycle. I'll fix the numbers."
"The metrics don't tell the whole story. Read the field reports."
